success.description: You are able to accurately deduce exactly what is expected of you in the current social situation: who to greet first, whether to approve or disapprove of a public figure, and so on. While this card is recharging, during your Beginning of Turn Phase you may remove 1 track token from one of your currently recharging Social action cards

bane.description: Remove a tracking token from this card

chaosStar.description: You are too focused on the task at hand. You gain the Overwhelmed condition while this card is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: When this action completely recharges, recover 1 stress or shame
